title: Inventory Vehicles
description: Vehicle-shaped items that give you some cool perks when powering them with fuel
body:
# Inventory Vehicles
This mod is fairly simple, it adds several vehicle-shaped items that give you certain perks when being powered with fuel
 

![Vehicle and item list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uz4nHB7F/images/3ccee82a09041101eab25a5c60ce2d38b5252db2.png)

There are various coloured cars, racecars, lorries, as well as some special ones such as ambulances, tractors, or even horses! etc.

**Mods like JEI or similar are highly recommended to check recipes**

## How to use a vehicle
While holding some filled fuel cans in your inventory, right-click with the desired vehicle on your main hand to use it, a can is going to be consumed in the process (You'll get back the empty can so you can fill it up again).

Take in account that you can only be using one vehicle at a time, you must wait for the perks to end to use another vehicle, or you can clear the perks using the car keys!

## Can I do X with your mod?

**Except reuploading the mod to other sites**, you can review it, use it in your server, your modpack, share it with your friends, whatever you want.
